Bash(sqlite3 data/marketpulse.db ".schema posts; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as post_count FROM posts;" 2>&1)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import sqlite3

db_path = "data/marketpulse.db"
conn = sqlite3.connect\(db_path\)
cursor = conn.cursor\(\)

# Get schema info
cursor.execute\("SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';"\)
tables = cursor.fetchall\(\)
print\("TABLES:", [t[0] for t in tables]\)

# Count rows per table
for table_name in [t[0] for t in tables]:
    cursor.execute\(f"SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM {table_name};"\)
    count = cursor.fetchone\(\)[0]
    print\(f"  {table_name}: {count} rows"\)

# Sample ticker_cache
print\("\\nTICKER_CACHE sample:"\)
cursor.execute\("SELECT ticker, symbol, mention_count, dominant_sentiment FROM ticker_cache LIMIT 5;"\)
for row in cursor.fetchall\(\):
    print\(f"  {row}"\)

# Sample posts
print\("\\nPOSTS sample \(first 3\):"\)
cursor.execute\("SELECT post_id, text[:80], source, sentiment FROM posts LIMIT 3;"\)
for row in cursor.fetchall\(\):
    print\(f"  {row}"\)

conn.close\(\)
EOF)
